description: Repository-scan retrieval hints for the currently formalized time_sleep_for_sync subpatterns. This layer is candidate retrieval only; verdicts must still come from patch review plus the subpattern JSON.

defaults.group_match_semantics: For grep_keywords_all_groups, every group should match at least one keyword before the candidate is treated as high-priority.
defaults.any_match_semantics: grep_keywords_any is only for weak recall; false positives are acceptable at this layer and should be filtered later by manual review plus the verdict-layer subpattern JSON.
defaults.exclude_semantics: grep_keywords_exclude are soft down-rank hints by default unless the caller explicitly chooses hard exclusions. Prefer recall over precision unless a known noise class causes sibling confusion or unreviewable candidate explosion.
defaults.rg_template_semantics: Treat broad_recall as the default first hop for coarse repository scanning. Use fallback_no_path only when broad_recall is empty, implausibly sparse, or likely to miss due to helper/layout drift. Use group_intersection only as an optional lightweight shrinker after recall; it must never be treated as an absence proof or hard gate.
defaults.path_globs_semantics: path_globs are soft search-priority hints, not hard absence proofs. Because some anchors may live in helper .go files or SQL/result assets, rerun fallback_no_path before concluding a subpattern is absent.

entries.subpattern_key: 固定 sleep 当同步屏障必须改成确定性同步原语
entries.pattern_file: 固定_sleep_当同步屏障必须改成确定性同步原语.json
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 第一跳先用 sleep/timer 召回，再用“同步门禁/握手锚点（WaitGroup/channel/ready/bootstrap/显式 load/wait API）”做文件级交集，优先检查 sleep 是否在充当同步屏障，而不是业务 backoff/节流。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 按 sleep/timer 入口做粗召回；默认先限制在 Go tests（*_test.go），避免把生产 backoff/节流语义大量捞进来。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 当 sleep/timer 锚点出现在 helper 或非 test file 时，去掉路径限制做兜底召回（注意：可能爆炸）。

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 第二跳把“sleep/timer”与“同步门禁/握手锚点”做文件级交集，用于排序/优先级提示；它不一定能显著 shrink（锚点较通用），也不是 absence proof。

entries.subpattern_key: sleep 等异步状态传播必须改成 Eventually/条件轮询
entries.pattern_file: sleep_等异步状态传播必须改成_Eventually_条件轮询.json
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 优先抓 Eventually/轮询等待相关锚点；如果只看到 sleep 而没有明确 condition+timeout，先当低优先级候选，再回到 verdict layer 判断它是否只是“加长 sleep”的缓解。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 第一跳直接按 Eventually/轮询等待锚点召回；它会跨 family 命中，但可作为优先候选池。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 当 Eventually/轮询等待锚点落在 helper 或非 test file 时，去掉路径限制兜底召回。

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 第二跳把 Eventually/轮询等待锚点与 sleep/timer 症状做文件级交集，帮助把“确实从 sleep 迁移到条件轮询”的候选优先挑出来；只是 shrinker，不是 absence proof。

entries.subpattern_key: stale read / as-of timestamp 测试必须显式控制 TSO/now，而不是短 sleep
entries.pattern_file: stale_read_as_of_timestamp_测试必须显式控制_TSO_now_而不是短_sleep.json
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 先抓 stale read / as-of timestamp 场景，再用 TSO/now 控制锚点做交集；这条子模式的检索层可以更 aggressive，因为锚点相对具体。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 第一跳按 stale read/as-of 场景粗召回。

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 当 stale read/as-of 锚点落在 helper 或非 test file 时，去掉路径限制兜底召回。

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 第二跳对 stale read/as-of 候选做 TSO/now 控制锚点交集，优先挑出“显式控制时间语义”的候选；只是 shrinker，不是 absence proof。
